name: Bill of Sale (Personal Property / As-Is)
description: A simple contract for the private sale of second-hand goods (furniture, electronics, etc.) sold in 'as-is' condition.
content:
BILL OF SALE (PERSONAL PROPERTY)

This Bill of Sale is made and entered into on {{formatDate date_of_sale}} by and between the Seller and the Buyer named below, for the sale of the personal property described herein.

1. THE PARTIES

Seller: {{seller_name}}
Address: {{seller_address}}
Phone: {{seller_phone}}

Buyer: {{buyer_name}}
Address: {{buyer_address}}
Phone: {{buyer_phone}}

2. DESCRIPTION OF PROPERTY

The Seller hereby sells and transfers to the Buyer the following used personal property (the "Property"):

{{item_description}}

3. PURCHASE PRICE AND PAYMENT

The Buyer agrees to pay the Seller the total purchase price of {{purchase_price}}.

Payment was / will be made via {{payment_method}} on {{payment_timing}}.

4. DELIVERY AND "AS-IS" CONDITION

The Property shall be delivered to the Buyer on {{formatDate delivery_date}} at {{delivery_location}}.

AS-IS CLAUSE: The Buyer acknowledges that the Property is sold "AS IS" and "WITH ALL FAULTS." The Seller makes no warranties or guarantees, express or implied, regarding the condition, merchantability, or fitness for a particular purpose of the Property.

{{#if seller_disclosures}}

Seller Disclosures: The Seller discloses the following known defects or issues with the Property:

{{seller_disclosures}}
{{/if}}

5. TRANSFER OF OWNERSHIP

The Seller warrants that they are the lawful owner of the Property and that it is free of all liens and encumbrances. Ownership transfers to the Buyer upon full payment and delivery.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the Parties have executed this Bill of Sale on the date first written above.

SELLER
{{seller_name}}

Signature: _________________________

BUYER
{{buyer_name}}

Signature: _________________________

fields.name: item_description
fields.label: Description of Property / Items
fields.placeholder: e.g., 1x Used Sony Refrigerator, 1x Leather Sofa...

fields.name: payment_timing
fields.label: Payment Timing
fields.placeholder: e.g., At the time of signing, Upon delivery

fields.name: seller_disclosures
fields.label: Seller Disclosures (Known Defects)
fields.placeholder: List any scratches, broken parts, etc. Leave blank if none.
